items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study (n=92) estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport in recreational/competitive athletes.
items.curatedReason: 韧带重建和非手术管理之间的最小有益效应（SWE）评估，能帮助你更好地与患者讨论ACL损伤的治疗选择，特别是权衡收益与危害时。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗的最小有益效应：一项收益-危害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项收益-危害权衡研究（n=92）评估了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建加康复与单纯康复相比，在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: Assessing the smallest worthwhile effect (SWE) between ACL reconstruction and non-surgical management can help you better discuss treatment options for ACL injuries with patients, especially when weighing benefits and harms.
items.limitation: 本研究基于在线问卷的患者自报结果，可能存在回忆偏倚，且样本量相对有限（n=92）。
items.limitationEn: This study relied on patient-reported outcomes via an online survey, which may introduce recall bias, and the sample size was relatively limited (n=92).

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper comments that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) improved exercise capacity as much as, and health status more than, center-based pulmonary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项评论强调了移动端肺康复与中心肺康复在COPD患者锻炼能力方面的非劣效性，但在健康状况改善上更优。在资源受限地区或患者依从性不佳时，这可能是值得考虑的方案。
items.titleZh: 评论：移动端肺康复对COPD患者运动能力和健康状况的改善不劣于中心肺康复
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论指出，针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）的移动端肺康复在运动能力改善上不劣于中心肺康复，且在健康状况改善方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the non-inferiority of mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation compared to center-based PR for exercise capacity in COPD patients, with superior improvements in health status. This could be a viable option in resource-limited areas or for patients with poor adherence.

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: The PhysioFIRST study, an assessor-blinded RCT, found physiotherapist-led targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) and standardized stretching (STRETCH) similarly improved hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change at 6 months for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，物理治疗师主导的靶向强化训练与标准化牵伸对股骨髋臼撞击综合征的疗效相似，都显著改善患者生活质量。这意味着在临床实践中，你可以根据患者具体情况和偏好灵活选择这两种方法。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗（PhysioFIRST研究）：一项评估者盲法、有限披露的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: PhysioFIRST研究是一项评估者盲法随机对照试验，发现物理治疗师主导的靶向强化训练（STRENGTH）和标准化牵伸（STRETCH）在股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者中，对髋关节相关生活质量和患者感知整体变化评分的改善在6个月时相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that physiotherapist-led targeted strengthening and standardized stretching offer similar efficacy for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome, both significantly improving patient quality of life. This means you can flexibly choose between these two approaches in clinical practice based on patient specifics and preferences.
items.limitation: 研究随访时间为6个月，需要更长的随访来评估长期疗效。
items.limitationEn: The study had a 6-month follow-up, and longer follow-up is needed to assess long-term efficacy.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis compared physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, aiming to identify the most effective intervention for pain, function, quality of life (QoL), and adverse events (AEs).
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析对肩袖肌腱病的不同物理治疗干预措施进行了比较，为你提供了选择最有效治疗方案的证据。在临床实践中，应优先选择在疼痛、功能和生活质量方面显示出更优效果的干预。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较效果：一项系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络Meta分析比较了成人肩袖肌腱病的不同物理治疗干预措施，旨在确定对疼痛、功能、生活质量（QoL）和不良事件（AEs）最有效的干预。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis compares different physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, providing you with evidence to select the most effective treatment. In clinical practice, prioritize interventions that show superior outcomes in pain, function, and quality of life.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的结果可能受到纳入研究异质性和间接比较的限制，需要谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: The results of network meta-analysis may be limited by heterogeneity and indirect comparisons among included studies, requiring cautious interpretation.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device (Hand Stretcher®) improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients, suggesting its potential for long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 这款动态腕手牵伸器在慢性卒中患者腕手痉挛管理中显示出潜力，特别适用于居家或门诊长期辅助治疗。别替代主动运动，当成现有方案的有效补充。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸器改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 30 名慢性卒中患者的初步随机对照试验发现，一款新型动态腕手牵伸器（Hand Stretcher®）能改善屈肌痉挛并提升手功能，提示其在长期管理中的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows potential in managing wrist and hand spasticity in chronic stroke patients, especially for long-term home or outpatient care. Do not replace active movement; consider it an effective adjunct to existing protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本试点RCT，需要更大规模的研究来验证其长期疗效和普适性。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample pilot RCT, and larger studies are needed to validate its long-term efficacy and generalizability.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease (PD), finding rTMS effective in the short term, with variable modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: rTMS对帕金森病运动功能短期改善的证据逐渐扎实，但长期效果和最佳参数仍不明确。考虑将其作为辅助手段，别指望它单枪匹马解决问题。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能的疗效及调节因素：一项Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项Meta分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病（PD）患者运动功能的短期和长期疗效，发现rTMS在短期内有效，但调节因素具有可变性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence for short-term motor function improvement with rTMS in Parkinson's disease is growing, but long-term efficacy and optimal parameters remain unclear. Consider it an adjunctive therapy, not a standalone solution.
items.limitation: 该Meta分析未能明确报告不同刺激参数对长期效应的影响，且纳入研究间的异质性可能影响结果外推。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis did not clearly report the impact of different stimulation parameters on long-term effects, and heterogeneity among included studies may affect generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review on hamstring injury return to play (RTP) found a high recurrence rate of 57% within the first month and identified a lack of clear consensus on weighted RTP criteria.
items.curatedReason: 膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）仍缺乏明确、标准化的加权标准。在制定RTP计划时，你需要综合考虑现有证据，别过度依赖单一指标。
items.titleZh: 膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项关于膕绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）的系统综述发现，首月内复发率高达57%，并指出在加权RTP标准上缺乏明确共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is still a lack of clear, standardized weighted criteria for return to play (RTP) after hamstring injury. When developing RTP plans, you need to integrate existing evidence and not over-rely on a single metric.
items.limitation: 系统综述指出现有研究在RTP标准上缺乏共识，且方法学质量分析未详述纳入研究的具体局限。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review noted a lack of consensus in existing research on RTP criteria, and the methodological quality analysis did not elaborate on specific limitations of the included studies.

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of 31 RCTs (n=1345) compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension, finding combined training effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络Meta分析明确了不同运动训练模式对高血压患者24小时动态血压的影响。在为高血压患者制定运动处方时，你可以依据研究结果，优先考虑联合训练，以期获得更佳的血压控制效果。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响：一项随机对照试验的网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含31项随机对照试验（n=1345）的网络Meta分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人24小时动态血压的影响，发现联合训练是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis clarifies the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. When prescribing exercise for hypertensive patients, you can prioritize combined training based on these findings to achieve better blood pressure control.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的结论可能受到纳入研究数量和质量的影响，且血压测量方式的标准化程度可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of the network meta-analysis may be affected by the number and quality of included studies, and there may be variations in the standardization of blood pressure measurement methods.

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis (n=71,715) using UK Biobank data estimated the dose-response effects of light-intensity physical activity (LPA) on all-cause mortality across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入分析了轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应关系。你可以利用这些信息，更精确地为患者制定个性化的活动建议，特别是针对那些难以达到高强度运动量的人群。
items.titleZh: 轻度与中高强度体力活动对全因死亡风险的剂量反应相互作用：一项因果推断分析
items.summaryZh: 一项使用英国生物样本库数据（n=71,715）进行的因果推断分析，评估了轻度体力活动（LPA）与中高强度体力活动（MVPA）不同水平下，LPA对全因死亡率的剂量反应效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study delves into the dose-response relationship between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity and all-cause mortality risk. You can use this information to more precisely tailor individualized activity recommendations for patients, especially for those who struggle to achieve high-intensity exercise levels.
items.limitation: 研究依赖加速度计数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有类型的体力活动，且英国生物样本库人群的代表性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on accelerometer data, which may not fully capture all types of physical activity, and the representativeness of the UK Biobank population may be limited.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly patients undergoing cardiac surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力有显著益处。你应将呼吸肌训练纳入老年心脏手术患者的康复方案，以优化预后。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates significant benefits of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients. You should incorporate respiratory muscle training into rehabilitation protocols for elderly cardiac surgery patients to optimize outcomes.
items.limitation: 试验的具体样本量和效应量在摘要中未明确给出，限制了对其强度和普适性的初步判断。
items.limitationEn: The specific sample size and effect size of the trial were not explicitly stated in the abstract, limiting initial assessment of its strength and generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article outlines strategies for rehabilitation clinicians to manage difficult conversations, emphasizing client-centered communication to foster strong client-clinician relationships and improve outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 在康复实践中，有效管理困难对话对建立以患者为中心的合作关系至关重要。本文提供了具体策略，帮助你提升沟通技巧，避免潜在的冲突并改善患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 促进康复中的以患者为中心沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.summaryZh: 本文概述了康复临床医生管理困难对话的策略，强调以患者为中心的沟通，以促进患者与临床医生之间的良好关系并改善预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: In rehabilitation practice, effectively managing difficult conversations is crucial for building client-centered, collaborative relationships. This article provides specific strategies to help you improve communication skills, avoid potential conflicts, and enhance patient adherence.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=211) surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning for sudden cardiac death (SCD) prevention, 22 years after Marc-Vivien Foe's death.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆足球运动员心脏骤停预防策略的追踪研究，揭示了全球体育运动中心脏筛查和应急响应的现状，对你思考本地体育赛事安全保障有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆足球运动员猝死预防：Marc-Vivien Foe悲剧性死亡22年后的追踪研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（n=211）调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部在马克-维维安·福伊（Marc-Vivien Foe）逝世22年后，关于心血管筛查和猝死（SCD）应急响应计划的现状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up study on sudden cardiac death prevention strategies for Cameroonian football athletes sheds light on the current state of cardiac screening and emergency response in global sports, offering insights for local sports safety protocols.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受参与者回忆偏倚影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey study, which cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to participant recall bias.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective observational study (n=206) in US Army trainees found that systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis alterations precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury (MSKI), associating with MSKI occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究揭示了炎症和氧化应激生物标志物与美国陆军训练中肌肉骨骼损伤的关联性。你应意识到这些生物标志物可能预示损伤风险，但目前证据不足以指导具体干预。
items.titleZh: 炎症和氧化应激改变先于肌肉骨骼损伤并持续存在于美国陆军受训者中
items.summaryZh: 一项针对206名美国陆军受训者的前瞻性观察研究发现，全身炎症和氧化还原稳态改变在肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）发生之前出现并持续存在，与MSKI的发生相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study reveals the association between inflammatory and oxidative stress biomarkers and musculoskeletal injuries during US Army training. You should be aware that these biomarkers may indicate injury risk, but current evidence is insufficient to guide specific interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，只能提示关联性，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, which can only suggest associations, not establish causality.

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness and optimize well-being amidst modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 在面对全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等极端条件下，如何维持体能是一项重大挑战。这份运动医学框架为你提供了在该背景下优化健康的思考方向。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露的运动与锻炼医学框架
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与锻炼医学框架，旨在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和潜在辐射暴露背景下，维持体能并优化身心健康。
items.curatedReasonEn: Maintaining fitness under extreme conditions like global conflict, enforced confinement, and radiation exposure is a major challenge. This sports and exercise medicine framework offers guidance on optimizing well-being in such contexts.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6MWTD, +60 meters vs. usual care at 6 months, p<0.001) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity in TIA and mild stroke patients compared to usual care over 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 6 个月随访的 RCT 结果提示，对 TIA 或轻度卒中患者，心血管康复在改善运动能力、身体活动和部分生活质量方面优于常规护理。这是你在向患者推荐或向医生转诊时可以引用的强有力证据。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 140 名患者的 RCT 发现，为期 6 周的心血管康复计划在 6 个月时显著改善了短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力（6MWTD 较常规护理增加 60 米，p<0.001）和中高强度身体活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 6-month RCT suggests that cardiovascular rehabilitation is superior to usual care for improving exercise capacity, physical activity, and some quality-of-life aspects in TIA or mild stroke patients. This is strong evidence you can cite when recommending to patients or referring to physicians.
items.limitation: 研究未报告心血管康复对血压、焦虑和抑郁的具体效果。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report specific effects of cardiovascular rehabilitation on blood pressure, anxiety, and depression.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week exergaming intervention significantly improved physical (e.g., grip strength, 6MWT), psychological (e.g., depression), and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 12 周的主动游戏（exergaming）干预能为机构老年肌少症患者带来多重益处，包括身体、心理和社会功能。在资源受限或传统运动方案依从性不佳时，这提供了一个有前途的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机构老年肌少症患者主动游戏的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 这项实用的准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的主动游戏干预显著改善了机构老年肌少症患者的身体（如握力、6MWT）、心理（如抑郁）和社会结局，优于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention can provide multiple benefits for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia, including physical, psychological, and social function. This offers a promising alternative when resources are limited or adherence to traditional exercise programs is poor.
items.limitation: 准实验研究设计，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a pragmatic quasi-experimental study design, which may have selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that lower physical activity levels were associated with greater functional limitations, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、疲劳和功能能力与较低的身体活动水平相关。在制定干预方案时，别只关注活动量本身，要同时管理这些共病因素。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，较低的身体活动水平与更大的功能受限、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, fatigue, and functional capacity are linked to lower physical activity levels in women with obesity. When designing interventions, address these comorbid factors alongside physical activity promotion.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This single-group feasibility study found that applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach to stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation setting was feasible across recruitment, dose, fidelity, perceived value, benefits, and potential outcomes.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法对卒中幸存者的应用是可行的，尤其在招募、干预依从性和患者接受度方面表现良好。尽管是可行性研究，但它提示了未来大规模 RCT 的潜力。
items.titleZh: 认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复背景下应用于卒中患者的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项单组可行性研究发现，在丹麦神经康复环境中将认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法应用于卒中幸存者是可行的，并在招募、剂量、依从性、感知价值、益处和潜在结果方面表现良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors, showing good recruitment, fidelity, and perceived value. Although a feasibility study, it suggests potential for future large-scale RCTs.
items.limitation: 这是一项单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-group pretest-posttest design, lacking a control group to assess actual intervention effects.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 1286 SCI patients found that higher SBP and DBP at admission were associated with higher BMI, lower neurological lesion level, and motor incomplete SCI. Clinically meaningful BP changes were common during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: SCI 患者住院康复期间的血压变化受多种因素影响，出入院时血压数据对长期管理有参考价值。这些发现能帮你更精准地评估和管理这些患者的血压风险。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间血压水平和临床有意义的变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 1286 名脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的回顾性队列研究发现，入院时较高的收缩压和舒张压与较高的 BMI、较低的神经损伤平面和运动不完全性 SCI 相关。住院康复期间临床有意义的血压变化很常见。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure changes during inpatient rehabilitation for SCI patients are influenced by various factors, and admission/discharge data are valuable for long-term management. These findings can help you more precisely assess and manage BP risks in these patients.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may have missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This editorial highlights the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis in young adults and emphasizes that early-stage symptomatic hip OA presents a critical opportunity for treatment to slow or change its trajectory, an area often overlooked in research and clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎的识别和干预是改善预后的“机会窗口”。临床实践中，别等到晚期才关注，早期干预能更好地改变疾病轨迹。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个“机会窗口”
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了年轻成人髋关节骨关节炎日益增长的患病率，并指出早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎是治疗以减缓或改变其病程的关键“机会窗口”，而这在研究和临床实践中常被忽视。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip OA is a "window of opportunity" for improving prognosis. In clinical practice, don't wait until late stages; early intervention can better alter the disease trajectory.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: A decision analytic model evaluating U.S. post-acute stroke care found Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) to be more cost-effective than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) from a payer perspective, despite higher initial costs, due to improved patient outcomes and lower readmission rates.
items.curatedReason: 对美国中风后康复的报销决策，这是关键数据。住IRF（急性康复）比SNF（专业护理）更具成本效益，IRF虽然初期成本高，但能带来更好的患者预后和更低的再入院率。这将支持向支付方争取IRF报销覆盖。
items.titleZh: 从美国医保支付方角度看急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构（IRF）对比专业护理机构（SNF）
items.summaryZh: 一项评估美国卒中后急性期护理的决策分析模型显示，从支付方角度看，住院康复机构（IRF）比专业护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益，尽管IRF初始成本较高，但能带来更好的患者预后并降低再入院率。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is crucial data for stroke post-acute rehabilitation reimbursement decisions in the U.S. Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) are shown to be more cost-effective than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs), providing better patient outcomes and lower readmission rates despite higher initial costs. This will support advocating for IRF reimbursement coverage with payers.
items.limitation: 模型研究结果基于模拟数据，而非真实世界RCT。
items.limitationEn: The study's findings are based on a decision analytic model, not real-world RCT data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: A correspondence piece highlights WHO's call to prioritize investment in people and integrate rehabilitation as an essential part of healthcare, moving beyond merely counting diseases to measuring functioning and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: WHO 强调康复投资应侧重“人”而非仅“设备”，这与 Cadence 倡导的以人为本、专业主导康复理念高度契合。这是对全球物理治疗行业具有指导意义的呼吁。
items.titleZh: 通讯：让康复发挥作用——投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 一篇通讯强调，世界卫生组织呼吁优先投资于人，并将康复作为医疗保健不可或缺的一部分，从单纯统计疾病转向衡量功能和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: WHO's emphasis on investing in "people" rather than just "devices" in rehabilitation strongly aligns with Cadence's advocacy for person-centered, profession-led rehabilitation. This is a guiding call to action for the global physical therapy profession.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigates changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across a broad range of 32 countries to better understand its current state in various population groups, aiming to promote healthy aging.
items.curatedReason: 内源性能力（Intrinsic Capacity）是健康老龄化的核心指标。这项涵盖32个国家的研究，能让你了解全球人口在内源性能力方面的变化趋势，为制定老年康复策略提供宏观参考。
items.titleZh: 内源性能力趋势：来自32个国家的证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了32个国家内源性能力的变化和时间趋势，旨在更好地了解其在不同人群中的现状，以促进健康老龄化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intrinsic Capacity is a key indicator of healthy aging. This study, covering 32 countries, provides insights into global trends in intrinsic capacity, offering a macro-level reference for developing geriatric rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，无法评估因果关系和具体干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, preventing evaluation of causality and specific intervention effects.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis using the All of Us Research Program investigates sociodemographic determinants of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury compared to a control cohort without disability.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了脊髓损伤（SCI）人群食物不安全状况的社会经济决定因素及其与BMI的关联。物理治疗师在全面照护SCI患者时，需要关注这些非临床因素，必要时转诊社会服务。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤个体食物不安全的社会人口学决定因素及其与BMI的关联：来自“All of Us”研究项目的横断面分析
items.summaryZh: 一项利用“All of Us”研究项目的横断面分析，调查了脊髓损伤个体食物不安全的社会人口学决定因素及其与BMI的关联，并与无残疾对照组进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the sociodemographic determinants of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI). Physical therapists, in providing holistic care for SCI patients, need to be aware of these non-clinical factors and refer to social services when necessary.
items.limitation: 横断面研究设计无法确定食物不安全与BMI之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional study design prevents determining causality between food insecurity and BMI.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This study explores the correlates of loneliness in persons with spinal cord injury, addressing a global public health problem exacerbated by debilitating injuries and increasing use of isolating technologies.
items.curatedReason: 孤独感是影响脊髓损伤（SCI）患者康复结局的重要心理社会因素。这项研究有助于你更好地理解SCI患者的孤独感相关因素，从而在康复计划中纳入社会心理支持策略。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素，孤独感是全球公共卫生问题，在致残性损伤和日益隔离的技术使用下尤为突出。
items.curatedReasonEn: Loneliness is a significant psychosocial factor affecting rehabilitation outcomes in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI). This study helps you better understand the correlates of loneliness in SCI patients, enabling the integration of psychosocial support strategies into rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，无法评估干预措施对孤独感的影响。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, preventing evaluation of intervention effects on loneliness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summary: An editorial calls for monitoring the mental health of esports athletes following the IOC's recognition of the Olympic Esports Games, urging sports medicine and public health stakeholders to address this as a legitimate high-performance context.
items.curatedReason: 随着电子竞技被国际奥委会认可，电竞选手心理健康成为新的关注点。物理治疗师在预防和管理运动损伤方面有经验，应思考如何将专业技能拓展到这一新兴领域。
items.titleZh: 是时候关注电竞运动员的心理健康了
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论呼吁在国际奥委会认可奥林匹克电竞运动后，应关注电竞运动员的心理健康，敦促运动医学和公共卫生利益相关者将其视为一个合法的高绩效背景来处理。
items.curatedReasonEn: With esports gaining IOC recognition, the mental health of esports athletes is a growing concern. Physical therapists, with their experience in injury prevention and management, should consider how to extend their expertise to this emerging field.

items.title: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summary: An editorial highlights the high prevalence of period pain (dysmenorrhea) in female athletes (60%) and its negative impact on sports performance, calling for more evidence and tailored management pathways.
items.curatedReason: 痛经在女运动员中普遍存在，且严重影响运动表现。作为临床物理治疗师，我们需要认识到这一问题，并与跨学科团队协作，为女运动员提供量身定制的康复和管理路径，这涉及到骨科（盆底）或运动康复范畴。
items.titleZh: 女运动员痛经：一项行动呼吁——是时候填补证据空白并开发定制化管理路径了
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论强调了女运动员（60%）痛经的高发病率及其对运动表现的负面影响，呼吁开展更多研究并开发定制化的管理路径。

items.title: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summary: An editorial introduces "paediatric powerpenia" as a lifecourse research priority, advocating for a shift in perspective towards preventing low muscular power in children due to its lifelong implications for musculoskeletal health.
items.curatedReason: “儿童期肌力缺乏”（paediatric powerpenia）是新提出的概念，强调儿童期肌肉力量不足对终生骨骼肌肉健康的影响。这提示物理治疗师需要更早地关注儿童的肌肉力量训练，将预防理念融入早期干预和儿童康复中。
items.titleZh: 播种力量的种子：将儿童期肌力缺乏作为生命历程研究的优先事项
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论将“儿童期肌力缺乏”引入为生命历程研究的优先事项，倡导将视角转向预防儿童肌肉力量不足，因其对肌肉骨骼健康具有终生影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: “Paediatric powerpenia” is a newly proposed concept highlighting the lifelong impact of insufficient muscle power in childhood on musculoskeletal health. This suggests that physical therapists need to focus on muscle power training in children earlier, integrating preventive concepts into early intervention and pediatric rehabilitation.

items.title: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD Academy Award summarizes research on rehabilitation and opioid use after revision total hip replacement, examining patient experiences, the effectiveness of targeted exercise programs, and predictors of persistent opioid use over two years.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究深入探讨了髋关节置换术后康复、阿片类药物使用和患者体验，涵盖了功能表现、定制化运动方案以及阿片类药物依赖的风险因素。这对临床制定髋关节置换术后康复策略具有重要参考价值。
items.titleZh: 翻修全髋关节置换术后的康复和结局：患者体验、优化康复干预和阿片类药物使用（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士学院奖研究总结了翻修全髋关节置换术后康复和阿片类药物使用的研究，探讨了患者体验、靶向运动方案的有效性以及两年内持续阿片类药物使用的预测因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research deeply explores rehabilitation, opioid use, and patient experiences following revision total hip replacement, covering functional performance, tailored exercise programs, and risk factors for opioid dependence. This provides significant reference value for developing post-revision THR rehabilitation strategies in clinical practice.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: This systematic review, utilizing COSMIN methodology, evaluated the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke. Searching five electronic databases, it aimed to clarify the quality and certainty of evidence regarding TIS's measurement properties, which were previously unclear despite its wide use.
items.curatedReason: TIS 是卒中康复中常用的评估工具。这项系统综述使用 COSMIN 方法学，为你明确了 TIS 在卒中患者中测量的信效度证据，可以作为你临床选择和解读 TIS 的重要依据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干损伤量表（TIS）的心理测量学特性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述采用 COSMIN 方法学，旨在评估卒中患者躯干损伤量表（TIS）的心理测量学特性。通过检索五个电子数据库，本研究旨在明确 TIS 测量特性的证据质量和确定性，此前这些信息尽管 TIS 应用广泛但仍不清晰。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TIS is a commonly used assessment tool in stroke rehabilitation. This systematic review, using COSMIN methodology, clarifies the evidence on the measurement properties of TIS in stroke patients, serving as a crucial reference for your clinical selection and interpretation of TIS.
items.limitation: 综述纳入研究的质量和证据确定性仍有待进一步提升。
items.limitationEn: The quality and certainty of evidence from the included studies in the review still need further improvement.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This review examined outcome measure (OM) utilization patterns in 1,548 randomized controlled trials (RCTs) of post-stroke lower extremity motor rehabilitation across low-to-middle income (LMICs) and high-income countries (HICs). It found that LMICs tended to use more generalized impairment and activities of daily living OMs that rely on patient observation.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述揭示了高收入和中低收入国家在卒中下肢康复 RCT 中结局测量工具使用模式的差异。它提醒你，在阅读不同国家的研究时，要特别关注其选用的结局指标，这可能影响结果的可比性。
items.titleZh: 中低收入国家与高收入国家卒中康复下肢试验中结局测量工具使用模式
items.summaryZh: 本综述分析了 1,548 项卒中后下肢运动康复随机对照试验（RCT）中结局测量（OM）工具的使用模式，比较了中低收入国家（LMICs）和高收入国家（HICs）的差异。研究发现，LMICs 更倾向于使用依赖患者观察的更通用的功能障碍和日常生活活动 OM。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reveals differing patterns of outcome measure utilization in stroke lower extremity rehabilitation RCTs between high- and low-to-middle-income countries. It reminds you to pay close attention to the outcome measures used when reviewing studies from different countries, as this may affect comparability.
items.limitation: 研究仅关注已发表的英文 RCT，可能存在发表偏倚和语言限制。
items.limitationEn: The study focused only on published English RCTs, which may introduce publication bias and language limitations.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study analyzed changes in anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) following an 8-week structured visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) program in 92 patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy (AUVP). Assessments included the video Head Impulse test (vHIT- HIMP and SHIMP) at baseline and post-intervention.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，视觉-前庭物理治疗可改善急性单侧前庭病变患者的反代偿性眼跳。这为你在临床实践中评估和治疗前庭功能障碍提供了新的视角和潜在的生物标志物。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者视觉-前庭物理治疗后反代偿性眼跳变化：一项前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究分析了 92 名急性单侧前庭病变（AUVP）患者在完成为期 8 周的结构化视觉-前庭物理治疗（VVPT）项目后，其反代偿性眼跳（AcS）的变化。基线和干预后评估包括视频头脉冲测试（vHIT- HIMP 和 SHIMP）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that visuo-vestibular physical therapy can improve anti-compensatory saccades in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy. This offers new perspectives and potential biomarkers for your clinical assessment and treatment of vestibular dysfunction.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且缺乏对照组。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality and lacks a control group.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: This multi-method study integrated a structured narrative review, expert consensus via a two-round Delphi process with 15 multidisciplinary Parkinson's disease experts, and multi-criteria decision-making using the Best-Worst Method. It aimed to identify and quantitatively prioritize fall prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项多方法研究整合了叙述性综述、Delphi 专家共识和多标准决策分析，为你量化了帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先顺序。这是一个综合性的视角，指导你为帕金森病患者设计更有效的跌倒干预方案。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先排序：一项多方法评估
items.summaryZh: 这项多方法研究整合了结构化叙述性综述、通过两轮 Delphi 过程与 15 名多学科帕金森病专家达成的专家共识，以及使用最佳-最差方法进行的多标准决策。研究旨在确定并量化帕金森病患者跌倒预防策略的优先顺序。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-method study integrates a narrative review, Delphi expert consensus, and multi-criteria decision-making to quantitatively prioritize fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease. This comprehensive perspective guides you in designing more effective fall interventions for Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 专家共识和决策分析的性质决定了结果可能受专家组构成和其主观判断的影响。
items.limitationEn: The nature of expert consensus and decision analysis means that the results may be influenced by the composition of the expert panel and their subjective judgments.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study examined the frequency of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing in patients with stroke and their associations with post-treatment rehabilitation outcomes. Patients with post-stroke hemiplegia undergoing inpatient rehabilitation were evaluated at baseline and after a 4-week rehabilitation program.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究强调了卒中后神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与康复结局的关联。这提醒你，在卒中康复中，除了关注运动功能，还应重视疼痛管理和心理干预，以优化患者的功能恢复和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与卒中患者康复结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究调查了卒中患者神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化的发生频率及其与治疗后康复结局的关联。研究对接受住院康复的卒中偏瘫患者在基线和 4 周康复计划后进行了评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study highlights the association between neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes after stroke. It reminds you to prioritize pain management and psychological interventions in stroke rehabilitation, in addition to motor function, to optimize patients' functional recovery and quality of life.
items.limitation: 研究设计为观察性，无法确立神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与康复结局的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The observational study design prevents the establishment of a causal relationship between neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing and rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients undergoing elective ACDF from 2012-2022 determined that sarcopenia increased the risk of adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) within 3 years post-surgery. Sarcopenia was assessed using cross-sectional muscle and vertebral body measurements at C4 mid-vertebral level.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究提示，肌少症是前路颈椎椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）术后三年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这提醒你，在 ACDF 术前评估中应关注患者的肌少症情况，并考虑将其纳入术后康复计划。
items.titleZh: 肌少症在前路颈椎椎间盘切除融合术后三年内增加邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 这项探索性回顾性队列研究涵盖 2012-2022 年间接受择期 ACDF 的 333 名成年患者，结果确定肌少症在前路颈椎椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）术后三年内增加了邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。研究通过 C4 椎体中段的横截面肌肉和椎体测量来评估肌少症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests that sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). This highlights the importance of assessing sarcopenia in ACDF preoperative evaluations and considering it in postoperative rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究设计可能存在选择偏倚和信息偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective study design may be subject to selection and information bias.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review with meta-analysis, encompassing 17 trials and 1,372 participants, evaluated shortwave diathermy (SWD) for knee osteoarthritis (KOA). It found SWD significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.02, -0.42]; p < .01).
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 17 项试验 1,372 名参与者的系统综述与 meta 分析证实，短波透热疗法（SWD）能显著改善膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛（平均改善 -2.13）和步行能力（平均改善 -0.72）。将 SWD 纳入你的 KOA 治疗方案有充分的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与 meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 这项包含 17 项试验和 1,372 名参与者的系统综述与 meta 分析评估了短波透热疗法（SWD）治疗膝骨关节炎（KOA）的疗效。研究发现，SWD 显著改善了疼痛（平均改善 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（平均改善 -0.72；95% CI [-1.02, -0.42]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials with 1,372 participants confirms that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improves pain (mean improvement -2.13) and walking ability (mean improvement -0.72) in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. Incorporating SWD into your KOA treatment plans is well-supported by evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能对效应量估计的精确性有影响。
items.limitationEn: The heterogeneity of included studies may affect the precision of effect size estimates.

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: This randomized controlled clinical trial investigated the effects of 8 weeks of visual perturbation training on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in 24 ACLR male athletes who had returned to sport. The study addressed neuromuscular deficits beyond joint and surrounding musculature, particularly under visual or cognitive perturbations.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者的本体感觉和运动控制缺陷在视觉干扰下会更明显。这项 RCT 提示，视觉扰动训练能有效改善 ACLR 术后男性运动员在无预判变向动作中的下肢生物力学和错误率，为你重返运动训练提供了新的方向。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员八周视觉扰动训练对无预判变向动作下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照临床试验研究了 24 名已重返运动的 ACLR 男性运动员，经过 8 周视觉扰动训练后，其在无预判变向动作中下肢生物力学和错误的变化。该研究旨在解决关节及其周围肌肉群之外，尤其是在视觉或认知扰动下的神经肌肉缺陷问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Proprioceptive and motor control deficits in ACL reconstruction patients are more pronounced under visual perturbation. This RCT suggests that visual perturbation training effectively improves lower-limb biomechanics and error rates during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in male athletes post-ACLR, offering a new direction for your return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性运动员，结果可能不完全适用于女性运动员。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to male athletes, so the results may not be fully applicable to female athletes.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: This study aimed to validate the Direct Observation of Procedural Skills for knee joint mobilization (DOPSknee) tool for on-site and off-site use in physical therapy education, involving 42 preclinical PT students assessed by two clinical instructors. DOPSknee demonstrated good on-site inter-rater reliability.
items.curatedReason: 评估工具的信效度研究对教育和临床实践工具的标准化有意义。这份研究验证的 DOPSknee 工具可以在临床带教和学生评估中提供即时反馈。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗教育中膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPS）工具的现场和非现场效度与信度
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在验证膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPSknee）工具在物理治疗教育现场和非现场使用的有效性和可靠性，研究对象为 42 名临床前物理治疗学生，由两名临床导师进行评估。结果显示，DOPSknee 在现场评估中表现出良好的评估者间信度。
items.curatedReasonEn: Validity and reliability studies of assessment tools are crucial for standardizing education and clinical practice. This study validates the DOPSknee tool, which can provide immediate feedback in clinical supervision and student assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅为 PT 学生，其表现可能无法完全代表临床实践中的真实情况。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were only PT students, so their performance may not fully represent real-world clinical practice.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This randomized external feasibility trial with an embedded process evaluation explored the feasibility of TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain. It aimed to recruit adults with activity-related joint pain for at least 3 months, randomizing them to either the TRAK MSK intervention or usual NHS physiotherapy care.
items.curatedReason: 数字物理治疗项目是未来的趋势。这项可行性研究显示 TRAK MSK 干预在招募、依从性和数据收集方面具备进行一项确证性试验的潜力，值得你关注。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项随机外部可行性试验旨在评估 TRAK MSK（一项数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目）的可行性。研究招募了患有活动相关关节疼痛至少 3 个月的成年人，将其随机分配至 TRAK MSK 干预组或常规 NHS 物理治疗组。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital physiotherapy programs are a future trend. This feasibility study shows that the TRAK MSK intervention has the potential for a definitive trial in terms of recruitment, adherence, and data collection, making it worthy of your attention.
items.limitation: 本研究为可行性试验，样本量较小，且无法提供干预措施的最终疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility trial with a small sample size, unable to provide definitive efficacy data for the intervention.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement due to limited evidence. The study aimed to describe the variation in guidance, which can influence patients' confidence, adherence to rehabilitation, and recovery outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议差异巨大，这对患者依从性和康复效果有影响。这项调查为你展示了当前临床实践中的不一致性，提醒你注意标准化指南的重要性。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，由于缺乏证据，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在显著差异。本研究旨在描述指导意见中的这种差异，其可能影响患者的信心、康复依从性和恢复结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement vary widely, affecting patient adherence and rehabilitation outcomes. This survey highlights current inconsistencies in clinical practice, reminding you of the importance of standardized guidelines.
items.limitation: 研究仅针对瑞典物理治疗师进行，其结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted only among Swedish physiotherapists, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis found a significant cross-education effect (force production gains in the contralateral non-trained limb) after unilateral resistance training in clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 单侧阻力训练的交叉教育效应在临床人群中表现出显著的益处，尤其是在肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者中。在无法进行双侧训练时，这是一个非常有价值的训练策略，现在你可以更有信心地将其纳入康复方案。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后临床人群力量产生能力的交叉教育效应：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，单侧阻力训练后临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者）的力量产生能力存在显著的交叉教育效应（对侧未训练肢体力量增强）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect of unilateral resistance training shows significant benefits in clinical populations, particularly for musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke. This is a highly valuable training strategy when bilateral training is not feasible, and you can now integrate it into rehabilitation protocols with greater confidence.
items.limitation: 元分析结果异质性高，训练参数（如收缩类型、强度）对效应量的具体贡献尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in meta-analysis results, and the specific contribution of training parameters (e.g., contraction type, intensity) to the effect size remains unclear.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that those receiving preoperative physiotherapy before primary total knee arthroplasty (TKA) had improved patient-reported outcomes (KOOS-PS) and pain at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively compared to those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 术前物理治疗是否能改善 TKA 术后预后仍无定论。这个大样本观察性研究虽然提示有益，但因其回顾性设计，存在难以控制的混杂因素，不能作为改变常规实践的依据。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的队列研究纳入 1,688 例患者，发现与未接受术前物理治疗的患者相比，接受初次全膝关节置换术前物理治疗的患者在术后 2 个月和 1 年的患者报告结局（KOOS-PS）和疼痛有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of preoperative physiotherapy on TKA outcomes remains unclear. While this large observational study suggests benefits, its retrospective design introduces confounding factors, preventing it from being a basis for changing routine practice.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未报告具体干预方案。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, potential for confounding factors, and specific intervention protocols were not reported.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 60 participants with upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome found that combined therapeutic massage and conventional physiotherapy showed superior short-term effects on pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life compared to either intervention alone.
items.curatedReason: 手法治疗和常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征短期效果均有，但联合治疗似乎更优。这个研究为临床实践中结合两者提供了初步证据。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 60 例上斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，治疗性按摩联合常规物理治疗在短期内对疼痛、压痛阈值、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量的改善优于单独使用任何一种干预措施。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both manual therapy and conventional physiotherapy show short-term benefits for myofascial pain syndrome, but combined treatment appears superior. This study provides preliminary evidence for integrating both approaches in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（n=60），仅评估了短期效果。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size (n=60) and only short-term effects were evaluated.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study exploring physiotherapists' perceptions of the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention found it acceptable, but successful implementation relies on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: 虽然这项定性研究显示 WalkBack 预防腰痛项目对物理治疗师有吸引力，但其成功推广依赖于全面的培训、临床实践的灵活性以及诊所层面的支持。在考虑引入新项目时，你需要提前规划这些要素。
items.titleZh: 用于预防腰痛的 WalkBack（步行与教育）项目对物理治疗师而言是可接受的，但其优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探讨物理治疗师对 WalkBack（步行与教育）腰痛预防项目看法的定性研究发现，该项目可接受，但其成功实施依赖于培训、实践灵活性和系统层面的促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this qualitative study indicates the WalkBack low back pain prevention program is appealing to physiotherapists, successful implementation hinges on comprehensive training, clinical flexibility, and system-level support. You need to plan for these elements when considering new program adoption.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，结果受访谈者主观感知影响。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, results influenced by subjective perceptions of interviewees.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1350 Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain identified socio-cultural factors as predictors of short- and long-term pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的预后有预测作用。在评估和制定治疗方案时，除了生物医学因素，你需要更全面地考虑患者的社会文化背景。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的预测性社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 1350 名荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者的非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素是非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者短期和长期疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量结局的预测因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Socio-cultural factors are predictive of outcomes in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. When assessing and developing treatment plans, you need to consider patients' socio-cultural backgrounds more comprehensively, beyond just biomedical factors.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，仅限于荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, limited to Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients, with limited generalizability of results.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' and patients' experiences with SupportPrim PT, an AI-powered clinical decision support system for musculoskeletal disorders, finding it influences decision-making processes.
items.curatedReason: 临床决策支持系统（CDSS）在肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的作用正在探索中。在评估这类人工智能辅助工具时，你需要关注它如何影响治疗师和患者的决策自主权，而不是单纯追求技术能力。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者体验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师和患者对 SupportPrim PT（一种人工智能驱动的肌肉骨骼疾病临床决策支持系统）的体验，发现它会影响决策过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: The role of Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) in musculoskeletal disorder management is evolving. When evaluating such AI-assisted tools, you need to focus on how they influence the decision-making autonomy of both therapists and patients, rather than solely on technical capabilities.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，受访者来自挪威单一地区。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, and interviewees were from a single region in Norway.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study comparing 23 individuals with stroke, 23 age-matched community-dwelling adults, and 12 young adults, found stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings, particularly in trunk rotation and supporting foot adjustment.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者在通过狭窄开口时的运动模式与健康人不同。在康复训练中，你需要针对性地关注躯干旋转和支撑足调整，这对于提高他们的功能性移动能力至关重要。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项比较 23 名卒中患者、23 名年龄匹配的社区老年人和 12 名年轻人的横断面研究发现，卒中患者在通过狭窄开口时存在特定运动模式，尤其是在躯干旋转和支撑足调整方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients exhibit different movement patterns than healthy individuals when navigating narrow openings. In rehabilitation training, you need to specifically focus on trunk rotation and support foot adjustments, which are crucial for improving their functional mobility.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，样本量较小，且无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study with a small sample size, unable to infer causality.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 18 studies on self-management interventions for neurological conditions, mapping behavior change theories, techniques (BCTs), and their effectiveness in improving functioning outcomes, primarily covering stroke, spinal cord injury, and multiple sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 神经系统疾病的自我管理干预正在增多，但目前行为改变理论和技术的多样性较高。在设计或推荐自我管理项目时，你需要了解哪些行为改变技术可能有效，并根据患者具体情况选择合适的策略。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容和影响的范围审查
items.summaryZh: 一项范围审查确定了 18 项针对神经系统疾病自我管理干预的研究，梳理了行为改变理论、技术（BCTs）及其在改善功能结局方面的有效性，主要涵盖卒中、脊髓损伤和多发性硬化症。
items.curatedReasonEn: Self-management interventions for neurological disorders are increasing, but there is high variability in behavior change theories and techniques. When designing or recommending self-management programs, you need to understand which behavior change techniques might be effective and select appropriate strategies based on the patient's specific situation.
items.limitation: 文献类型主要是综述，缺乏统一的行为改变理论和技术报告，难以得出确切有效性结论。
items.limitationEn: Mainly review type literature, lacking uniform reporting of behavior change theories and techniques, making it difficult to draw definitive conclusions on effectiveness.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study explored the experiences of 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease, highlighting practices and challenges in quality, content, and accessibility.
items.curatedReason: 线上帕金森病群体运动显示出可行性和依从性。你需要深入了解这些项目的交付经验，包括质量、内容和可及性挑战，以便更好地为患者提供线上康复服务。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的线上群体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性访谈研究探讨了 10 名康复和健身专业人员为帕金森病患者提供线上群体运动的经验，强调了在质量、内容和可及性方面的实践和挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise for Parkinson's disease shows feasibility and adherence. You need to understand the delivery experiences, including challenges in quality, content, and accessibility, to better provide online rehabilitation services to patients.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，仅代表提供者的经验，未直接评估患者体验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, representing only provider experiences, and not directly assessing patient experiences.

items.title: Preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak
items.summary: The Slava Topol Project (STP) launched a feasibility study for a preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak, a 7000 m mountain, aiming to improve safety for climbers following a guide's death in 2022.
items.curatedReason: 列宁峰的预防性搜救服务项目突出了高海拔环境下安全保障的重要性。虽然这与临床实践有距离，但它提醒我们在任何专业场景中，风险评估和预防措施都不可或缺。
items.titleZh: 列宁峰上的预防性搜救服务
items.summaryZh: 为提高列宁峰（一座海拔 7000 米的山峰）登山者的安全性，Slava Topol 项目（STP）启动了一项预防性搜救服务可行性研究，此前在 2022 年曾有一名向导遇难。
items.curatedReasonEn: The preventative search and rescue service project on Lenin Peak highlights the importance of safety in high-altitude environments. While this is somewhat distant from clinical practice, it serves as a reminder that risk assessment and preventative measures are essential in any professional setting.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This observational study found that digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold (PPT) assessment in 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis demonstrated excellent relative reliability (ICC values typically >0.75) and acceptable measurement error, suggesting its potential for clinical use.
items.curatedReason: 数字测压计用于终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压痛阈测量，显示出良好的信度和可接受的测量误差，在临床评估中可作为有效工具。
items.titleZh: 数字测压计测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压痛阈的信度研究：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究发现，在 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者中，基于数字测压计的压痛阈（PPT）评估表现出优异的相对信度（ICC 值通常 >0.75）和可接受的测量误差，提示其在临床应用中的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometry for pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients shows good reliability and acceptable measurement error, suggesting its utility in clinical assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so external generalizability should be considered.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: This observational cohort study of 317 severely injured trauma patients in Norway found that only 10% received assessment by a physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist within 72 hours, with early assessment occurring in 43% of patients with spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心对重伤患者的早期康复评估率较低，提示我们需要审视和改进创伤患者的物理医学与康复专家早期介入流程。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：一项来自两个挪威创伤中心的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项对挪威 317 名重度创伤患者的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的患者在 72 小时内接受了物理医学与康复专家的评估，其中脊髓损伤患者的早期评估率为 43%。
items.curatedReasonEn: The low rate of early rehabilitation assessment for severely injured trauma patients in Norwegian trauma centers indicates a need to review and improve the early involvement process for physical medicine and rehabilitation specialists in trauma care.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据来自挪威，结果外推至其他国家需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study, so it cannot establish causality. The data is from Norway, so generalizability to other countries should be considered.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This observational study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals who had undergone ACL reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, finding lower EMG activity in ACLR patients.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的比目鱼肌电活动，提示康复方案可能需要更多关注小腿三头肌的神经肌肉控制训练。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中跟腱三头肌的神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体和健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中跟腱三头肌的肌电（EMG）活动，发现 ACLR 患者的 EMG 活动较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACLR patients exhibit lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, suggesting rehabilitation protocols may need to focus more on neuromuscular control training for the triceps surae.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法提供纵向变化或因果关系，样本量未提及。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional design, so it cannot provide longitudinal changes or causality, and the sample size was not mentioned.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: This qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients found that mindset, effort, and support were key determinants in their decision to return to sport (RTS), condensing 271 meaning units into three categories: "motivation and driving forces," "treatment and recovery," and "medical clearance and readiness."
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策受心态、努力和支持的驱动，这提醒你在制定康复计划时，除了生理功能，更要重视患者的心理和社会支持因素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项对 112 名 ACL 损伤患者的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是他们重返运动（RTS）决策的关键决定因素，将 271 个意义单元浓缩为“动机和驱动力”、“治疗和恢复”以及“医疗许可和准备”三个类别。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients' decisions to return to sport after ACL injury are driven by mindset, effort, and support. This highlights the importance of addressing psychological and social support factors in rehabilitation planning, beyond just physiological function.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，无法量化各因素的重要性或建立因果关系，且基于患者自述。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, so it cannot quantify the importance of factors or establish causality, and it is based on patient self-reports.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey described how physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) is influenced by patient clinical presentation.
items.curatedReason: 针对儿童和青少年 ACLR 患者的血流限制训练，其临床决策受到患者表现的多种因素影响。作为物理治疗师，你需要更清晰地理解如何在临床实践中根据个体情况安全有效地应用 BFRT。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查描述了物理治疗师在儿童和青少年前交叉韧带重建术后患者中应用血流限制训练（BFRT）的临床决策如何受到患者临床表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent ACLR patients is influenced by various patient presentation factors. As a physical therapist, you need a clearer understanding of how to safely and effectively apply BFRT based on individual patient circumstances in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，无法反映因果关系或 BFRT 应用的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, so it cannot reflect causality or the actual effects of BFRT application.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松患者上肢脆性骨折后，跌倒风险和对跌倒的恐惧显著影响其生活和康复。你在制定康复计划时，应将这些心理社会因素纳入考量，而不仅仅关注骨折愈合。
items.titleZh: 老年骨质疏松伴近期上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法及需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了老年骨质疏松伴上肢骨折患者的视角，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒和跌倒恐惧（FoF）对日常生活的影响，以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Fall risk and fear of falling significantly impact the lives and rehabilitation of older adults with osteoporosis after an upper extremity fragility fracture. When developing rehabilitation plans, you should consider these psychosocial factors, not just fracture healing.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小且患者集中于上肢骨折，结果不一定能推广到其他类型骨折。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size and focuses on upper extremity fractures, so the results may not be generalizable to other fracture types.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: This single-blind randomized controlled trial involving 28 participants with chronic ankle instability found that both Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) immediately improved dynamic balance and proprioception, with ST showing superior effects on ankle joint position sense error.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）均能立即改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉，但在踝关节位置觉方面，ST 效果更优。在临床应用时，你需要根据具体康复目标选择不同贴扎策略。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳患者的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）均能立即改善动态平衡和本体感觉，其中 ST 在踝关节位置觉误差方面表现出更优的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) immediately improve dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability, but ST is superior for ankle joint position sense. When applying in clinic, you need to choose different taping strategies based on specific rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（n=28），且仅评估了即时效应，缺乏长期随访结果。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (n=28) and only evaluated immediate effects, lacking long-term follow-up results.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial involving 33 individuals with chronic stroke found that Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training significantly improved ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion, static balance, and fall efficacy compared to Mulligan taping with treadmill training or treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: Kinesio 贴扎联合跑步机训练，在改善慢性卒中患者踝关节背屈活动度、静态平衡和跌倒效能方面，优于单独跑步机训练和 Mulligan 贴扎。这提示你在卒中康复中，贴扎类型选择可能影响治疗效果。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 33 名慢性卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎联合跑步机训练在改善踝关节背屈被动活动度、静态平衡和跌倒效能方面，显著优于 Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练或单独跑步机训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training is superior to treadmill training alone and Mulligan taping in improving ankle dorsiflexion range of motion, static balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients. This suggests that the choice of taping type may influence treatment outcomes in stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（n=33），且随访期仅 6 周，结果的长期有效性有待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (n=33) and a follow-up period of only 6 weeks, so the long-term effectiveness of the results requires further investigation.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy (MT Group) for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain (RCRSP) was feasible in 68 participants and explored preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes, suggesting potential benefits.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步 RCT 显示，在肩袖相关肩痛的物理治疗中，联合手法治疗是可行的，并提示其可能带来额外的患者报告结局改善，支持开展更大规模的非劣效性研究。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗联合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的疗效：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项初步随机临床试验发现，对 68 名肩袖相关肩痛（RCRSP）患者进行手法治疗联合务实物理治疗（MT 组）是可行的，并探讨了对患者报告结局的初步治疗效果，提示其潜在益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that combining manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and may offer additional improvements in patient-reported outcomes, supporting a larger non-inferiority trial.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步随机对照试验，样本量相对较小，结果仅为初步效应，需大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a relatively small sample size; the results are preliminary and require validation in larger studies.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of UK physiotherapists revealed a high perceived relevance and willingness to adapt the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in paediatric musculoskeletal services among 55 clinicians.
items.curatedReason: MSK-HQ（肌肉骨骼健康问卷）在成人中应用广泛，此研究显示儿科物理治疗师对将其改编用于儿科肌肉骨骼疾病的意愿较高。关注儿童结局测量的同行可留意其后续发展。
items.titleZh: 改编 MSK-HQ 用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.curatedReasonEn: The MSK-HQ (Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire) is widely used in adults, and this study indicates high interest among pediatric physiotherapists in adapting it for pediatric musculoskeletal conditions. Clinicians focused on pediatric outcome measures should monitor its future development.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且为探索性研究，未进行实际的问卷验证。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size and is exploratory, without actual questionnaire validation.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current evidence on ChatGPT's use within musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on how the technology has been studied across clinical tasks, study designs, comparators, and outcome domains.
items.curatedReason: 该综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用证据，虽然未评估有效性，但有助于了解当前技术研究方向。如果你正在探索 AI 工具在临床中的潜力，可关注此类综述。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的应用：范围综述
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps existing evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, offering insight into current research directions without evaluating effectiveness. Clinicians exploring AI tools in practice may find this review relevant.
items.limitation: 该综述仅限于描绘当前证据，未进行研究质量评估或有效性分析。
items.limitationEn: This review only maps current evidence and does not assess study quality or effectiveness.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: The Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM) was successfully cross-culturally adapted into Mexican Spanish (PRISM-MX) and showed preliminary internal consistency and convergent validity in 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX（卒中痉挛患者报告影响量表）的墨西哥西班牙语版本已完成跨文化改编和初步验证。如果你在墨西哥或服务于墨西哥裔人群，评估卒中后痉挛时可关注此工具。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 用于卒中后痉挛：墨西哥样本的跨文化改编和初步心理测量学评估
items.curatedReasonEn: The Mexican Spanish version of the Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM-MX) has undergone cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary validation. Clinicians in Mexico or those serving Mexican populations may consider this tool for assessing post-stroke spasticity.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（30 例），仅提供了初步的心理测量学证据。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (30 participants) and provides only preliminary psychometric evidence.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: A B-A-B single-case study with inpatients post-stroke found that rhythmic contralateral resistance handgrip exercises for 5 minutes daily reduced hand edema, with sustained effects observed.
items.curatedReason: 这项单病例研究提示健侧手握力训练可能对卒中患侧手水肿有即时和持续的缓解效果。虽然证据等级不高，但作为一种简单的辅助干预，可在临床中考虑小范围尝试。
items.titleZh: 健侧手握力训练对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效应
items.curatedReasonEn: This single-case study suggests that contralateral handgrip exercise may have immediate and sustained effects on hand edema in stroke patients. Although the evidence level is not high, it could be considered for small-scale trials as a simple adjunctive intervention in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例设计，样本量小，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-case design study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review of 5 databases identified and described the intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation from 2012-2026, summarizing characteristics, components, and outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述描绘了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成部分和结局测量。它为跨不同护理环境的卒中患者协调护理提供了概览。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预及结局测量：一项范围综述
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review describes the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation. It provides an overview of coordinated care for stroke survivors across various settings.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，它主要描述了现有研究，但没有对干预效果进行批判性评价。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily describes existing research but does not critically appraise the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence, with factors like caregiver education influencing access.
items.curatedReason: 在喀麦隆进行的这项研究揭示了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。它强调了提升低资源环境中服务可及性的重要性，对面临类似挑战的地区有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性和依从性：一项医院研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy. It underscores the importance of improving service accessibility in low-resource settings, offering insights for regions facing similar challenges.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心横断面研究，可能存在选择偏倚，且发现仅限于喀麦隆的特定背景。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, cross-sectional study, which may have selection bias, and its findings are specific to the Cameroonian context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions with 12 clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, identifying patterns in their communication strategies.
items.curatedReason: 本观察性研究探讨了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中使用注意力焦点指令和反馈的方式。它提示在远程医疗中，关注儿童的注意力焦点策略对运动学习效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点指令和反馈的应用：一项观察性研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study explores how pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention instructions and feedback in telehealth. It suggests that focusing on children's attention strategies is crucial for motor learning outcomes in telehealth.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（6 位治疗师，12 位患者），且为探索性观察设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 clients) and an exploratory observational design, precluding causal conclusions.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, showing agreement with video truth data for mobility metrics like stride length, number of steps, and activity time.
items.curatedReason: 名为 PREEMPT 的活动监测器在住院患者中进行了验证，显示出测量步长、步数和活动时间等的准确性。如果你在老年或急性护理中需要客观测量患者活动，可关注此工具。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测器：患者/居民活动追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor has been validated in hospitalized patients, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, number of steps, and activity time. Clinicians needing objective activity measurement in geriatric or acute care may find this tool useful.
items.limitation: 验证研究的样本量相对较小（10 名健康老年人，46 名住院患者），且仅限于急性护理环境。
items.limitationEn: The validation study has a relatively small sample size (10 healthy older adults, 46 hospitalized patients) and is limited to acute care settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy session for improving health-related quality of life in adult cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议，但在安全性方面是可靠的。这意味着远程康复提供更多便利，但不应夸大其额外疗效。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复安全，但改善生活质量不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life, but is safe. This means telerehabilitation offers convenience without necessarily providing additional efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究未详细披露远程组的具体依从性数据，且生活质量可能受多种因素影响，单一干预难以完全捕捉。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail specific adherence data for the telerehabilitation group, and quality of life, influenced by various factors, may not be fully captured by a single intervention.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the effective facilitation of exercise therapy for multidirectional shoulder instability in a 12-year-old female karate athlete through the use of figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 一个针对学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的病例报告，结合八字贴扎和康复训练取得了积极效果。八字贴扎可能为不稳严重的患者在康复早期提供辅助支持。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：病例报告
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report shows positive outcomes in a school-aged karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability using figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation. The taping may offer adjunctive support for patients with severe instability in early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，结论的外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy
