items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: An update (3.0) to the clinical practice guideline in Germany on the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction has been published.
items.curatedReason: 这份德国临床实践指南更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的管理与实施，提供了最新的证据和操作规范。作为临床物理治疗师，特别是在神经康复领域，这份指南是你在处理相关患者时必须参考的最新标准，确保实践与国际前沿同步。
items.titleZh: 神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的管理与实施：德国临床实践指南更新3.0
items.summaryZh: 德国发布了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施的临床实践指南更新3.0版本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This updated German clinical practice guideline on the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization for neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction provides the latest evidence and operational standards. As a clinical physical therapist, especially in neurorehabilitation, this guideline is an essential reference for managing relevant patients, ensuring your practice is aligned with international best practices.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: An international team of researchers has restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models using a combined fusogenic therapy and comprehensive rehabilitation protocol.
items.curatedReason: 融合疗法结合全面康复在动物模型中恢复了完全脊髓横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。虽然是动物研究，但这种突破性进展为你提示了脊髓损伤康复未来可能的方向，可以密切关注其向人体试验转化的进展。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法结合康复在完全脊髓横断后恢复脊髓功能
items.summaryZh: 一个国际研究团队通过结合融合疗法和全面康复方案，在动物模型中恢复了完全脊髓横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: Fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models. Although an animal study, this breakthrough suggests a potential future direction for spinal cord injury rehabilitation, and you should closely monitor its progress toward human trials.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于动物模型，临床转化仍需时间。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to animal models, and clinical translation will still take time.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus | British Journal of Sports Medicine
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis on prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female athletes contributes to the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury Prevention (FAIR) consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和Meta分析为女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素提供了高证据等级的总结。你在指导女性运动员进行损伤预防和表现提升时，应将这些发现整合到你的评估和干预方案中，特别关注性别特异性的风险因素。
items.titleZh: 上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素：女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素的系统综述和Meta分析，为女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides a high-level evidence summary of prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. When guiding female athletes in injury prevention and performance enhancement, you should integrate these findings into your assessment and intervention protocols, paying particular attention to sex-specific risk factors.
items.limitation: 鉴于“早期发表”状态，仍需查阅全文以评估可能的局限性，如研究间的异质性或报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Given its "early publication" status, the full text should still be consulted to assess potential limitations, such as heterogeneity between studies or reporting bias.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (BONEMORE) investigated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women. Both interventions showed effects on physical function.
items.curatedReason: OsteoStrong和动态多组分运动对老年女性的身体功能均有积极影响。但如果原文有明确数据，要看干预的实际效应量，以决定是否值得作为首选推荐。在老年女性骨质疏松干预中，你需要关注这些新型手段的长期疗效和具体适用人群。
items.titleZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验：OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能影响的比较
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验探讨了 OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能的影响，结果显示两种干预措施均对身体功能有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: OsteoStrong and dynamic multicomponent exercise both positively influence physical function in older women. However, if the original text provides specific data, you need to assess the actual effect sizes of these interventions to determine if they warrant first-line recommendation. For osteoporosis interventions in older women, you should focus on the long-term efficacy and specific populations for whom these novel methods are applicable.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和外推性有待结合具体效应量进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: The clinical significance and generalizability of the findings require further evaluation in conjunction with specific effect sizes.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: This study evaluated longitudinal trends in functional status after ventral hernia repair, analyzing prospective data from a pilot trial (NCT05142618) between April 2022 and August 2024. It found that functional status improves after repair but has limits.
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但改善幅度存在限制。这提示你在患者术后康复中，应管理好患者预期，并根据TUG和5×STS测试结果，评估患者个体功能恢复的潜力与平台期，适时调整康复目标。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善极限
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态的纵向趋势，发现在术后功能会有改善，但改善幅度存在限制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limits to improvement. This suggests that in post-operative rehabilitation, you should manage patient expectations and, based on TUG and 5×STS test results, assess individual functional recovery potential and plateaus, adjusting rehabilitation goals accordingly.
items.limitation: 研究是试点试验的子分析，样本量可能不足以推断普遍性结论。
items.limitationEn: The study is a sub-analysis of a pilot trial, and the sample size may be insufficient to draw generalizable conclusions.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: A comparative Bayesian network analysis investigated directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用贝叶斯网络分析比较了多发性硬化症（MS）和帕金森病（PD）的症状依赖关系。了解这些疾病中症状如何相互影响，将帮助你更全面地评估患者，制定更具针对性的康复策略，尤其是那些看似不直接相关的共病症状。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症与帕金森病症状定向依赖关系：比较贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较贝叶斯网络分析研究了多发性硬化症和帕金森病中的症状定向依赖关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses Bayesian network analysis to compare symptom dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis (MS) and Parkinson's Disease (PD). Understanding how symptoms interact in these diseases will help you assess patients more comprehensively and develop more targeted rehabilitation strategies, especially for seemingly unrelated comorbidities.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络分析结果的因果推断需要进一步的临床验证。
items.limitationEn: Causal inferences from Bayesian network analysis results require further clinical validation.
